content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Planets". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/229/problem/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of planets. Then n lines follow, each containing a string s, which is the name of the planet.
content.outputFormat: For each planet, print the number of times it appears in the list, followed by the name of the planet.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed
general mixed case
hidden.input:
6
Mars
Earth
Mars
Jupiter
Earth
Saturn

solution.approach: Use a hash map to store the frequency of each planet and then print the frequency and name of each planet.
